name: ArvusForge
short_description: Craft your own weapons and carve your path in this fast-paced 3D roguelike action game. Defeat enemies, collect materials, and build powerful gear as you progress through a node-based world. Every run is a new challenge with randomized skills and endless crafting possibilities.
detailed_description:
ArvusForge is a 3D rogue-like action game centered around resource gathering and crafting.

Defeat enemies to collect materials, craft powerful weapons, and push forward through a branching node-based world.

Experience a unique blend of strategic progression and exhilarating combat in this node-driven crafting action adventure.

---------------- Objective ----------------

As an "Elementer" capable of processing various elemental energies, you will journey across countless worlds in pursuit of creating the ultimate weapon.

Gather elements by defeating enemies and shattering ore veins found within each realm.

Use the elements you’ve collected to forge a one-of-a-kind weapon that is truly your own.

---------------- Action ----------------

ArvusForge features top-down action that requires no camera management.

With simple controls limited to "Attack" and "Dodge," anyone can jump straight into the fray.

Attacks evolve through a three-stage combo system, changing dynamically as you strike.

Face off against a diverse array of enemies and attack patterns in combat that is simple to learn yet deep to master.

---------------- Crafting System ----------------

Items are defined by three traits: "Color," "Skill," and a "Grid (up to 9 slots)." Arrange these within the central workspace to forge your gear.

The crafting grid is divided into three sections, each corresponding to an attack stage (First, Second, and Third).

Combine different skills to birth a wide variety of weapons tailored to your specific playstyle.

Base stats increase according to color points, and reaching specific thresholds grants powerful bonus points.

With materials and skill combinations changing every run, you can challenge yourself to create new weapons time and time again.

---------------- The Ultimate Challenge ----------------

A formidable boss awaits at the deepest level. Overcome this final trial to complete your journey.

---------------- Key Features ----------------

• Playtime: Approximately 15–30 minutes per run. Replay to perfect your weapon-crafting mastery.

• Rogue-like Elements: Materials and skills are randomized, ensuring a fresh configuration every time you play.

• Genre: Crafting Action / Rogue-like / Progressive Action
